blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,516 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: dry, highs of 40°F, winds around 22 mph.
Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
